name: Artificial Flowers
description: Exquisitely crafted faux flowers that capture the beauty of nature, designed to bring timeless elegance to every room.

name: Artificial Plants & Greens
description: Lush, lifelike greenery that transforms your space into an evergreen sanctuary — zero maintenance, endless charm.

name: Vases & Planters
description: Handpicked vessels in ceramic, glass, and metal — the perfect complement to our premium artificial arrangements.

name: Wall Decor
description: Botanical-inspired wall art, wreaths, and hangings that add a touch of nature's grace to your walls.

name: Table Centerpieces
description: Show-stopping arrangements designed to elevate dining tables, consoles, and entryways with effortless luxury.

name: Festive & Seasonal Decor
description: Celebrate every occasion with our curated festive collections — from Diwali to Christmas and beyond.
